hero.title: Dial in your weapons.
hero.subtitle: Personal Vice Golf club fittings at Son Gual. One hour. Real data. Better golf.

fittingSection.title: 60 minutes. Built around your swing.
fittingSection.body: Walk in with questions, walk out with the right shaft, head, and lie angle. We use launch monitor data, your real ball flight, and Vice's complete head & shaft matrix to build clubs that fit your tempo, not someone else's.
includes: Launch monitor session at Son Gual
Full bag analysis or single-club focus

demoSection.title: Try the full Vice line. On us.
demoSection.body: Public demo days across Mallorca. No appointment, no fee — just show up and hit clubs.
demoSection.empty: No demo days scheduled. Check back soon, or reach out for a private session.

aboutSection.title: Fittings that respect your game.
aboutSection.body: I'm Gero — golfer, fitter, and the only certified Vice fitter on Mallorca. I built this service for players who are tired of guessing and ready to hit the right club, every time.

productsSection.title: The full Vice catalog.
productsSection.body: Drivers, woods, irons, wedges, putters, balls, and apparel — fit and ordered through me as your local Mallorca dealer.

book.title: Book your fitting
book.subtitle: 60 minutes at Son Gual — €90. Pay securely with card, get an instant calendar invite.

fields.name: Full name
fields.notesPlaceholder: Handicap, what you'd like to focus on, etc.

book.noSlots: No slots left on this day

errors.slotTaken: Sorry, that slot was just taken. Please pick another.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

success.title: You're booked.
success.body: Your fitting is confirmed. Check your email for the calendar invite and details. See you at Son Gual.

cancel.title: Payment cancelled
cancel.body: No problem. Your slot wasn't reserved — feel free to try again or reach out on WhatsApp.

footer.tagline: Official Vice Golf retailer & fitter on Mallorca.
